Item.DropDeedsOnly: Only Deeds can be dropped here.
Item.DropEffectsStatesOnly: Only Effects or States can be dropped here.
Item.DropArmorOnly: Only Effects and States can be applied to Armor.
Item.DropDeedsOnlyEffects: Only Effects and States can be applied to Deeds.
Item.DropTalentsOnly: Only Effects and States can be applied to Talents.
Item.DropRationsOnly: Only Effects and States can be applied to Rations.
Item.DropEffectsOnly: Only effects can be dropped here.

Inventory.SlotOccupied: Slot {placement} is already occupied by {name}. Unequip it first.
Inventory.InventoryFull: Inventory full! You need to drop an item before you can unequip {name}.
Inventory.InventoryCapReached: Inventory cap reached. You cannot add more unequiped items.
Inventory.HandsFull: Both hands are full. Unequip a weapon first.
Inventory.TwoHandedEquip: You must unequip both hands to equip a Two-Handed weapon.
Inventory.HeavyArmorLimit: You can only have one Heavy armor equipped.

Combat.NoTargetsAbort: No targets selected! Roll aborted, printing basic Accuracy for reference.
Combat.NoTargetsDefault: No targets selected! Rolling against default CD 10.
Combat.NotEnoughFocus: Not enough Focus to use {name}. (Needs {cost}, has {current})
Combat.NotEnoughEndurance: Not enough Endurance to use {name}. (Needs {cost}, has {current})
Combat.NotEnoughAP: You don't have enough Action Points!
Combat.NotYourPhase: It is not this token's phase!
Combat.NoWeaponEquipped: No weapon equipped! This deed requires a weapon.
Combat.NeedMeleeWeapon: This deed requires a melee weapon equipped.
Combat.NeedMissileWeapon: This deed requires a missile or thrown weapon equipped.
Combat.NeedSpellWeapon: This deed requires a spell weapon or free hand.
Combat.NeedFreeHand: This deed requires a free hand.
Combat.NeedWeapon: This deed requires a weapon equipped.
Combat.TargetOutOfRange: {name} is out of range ({distance} squares, max {range}).
Combat.MoveActionRequired: You must take the Move action (spend AP) before moving your token.
Combat.MovementLimitExceeded: You have exceeded your movement limit for this turn.
Combat.VaultStraightLine: Vault must be in a straight line (orthogonal or diagonal).
Combat.TooManyTargets: Too many targets selected ({count}). This deed targets at most {max}.
Combat.NoTokenOnCanvas: No token found on the canvas for this actor.
Combat.TemplateTooFar: Template is too far from the caster.
Combat.PathMustStartAdjacent: Path must start adjacent to your token.
Combat.PathMustShareEdge: Each square must share an edge with the previous one.
Combat.PathNoRoute: No valid path to that square within remaining squares.
Combat.BlastMustBeAdjacent: Close Blast must be adjacent to your token.
Combat.PlaceBlast: Place Blast {size}: click to place, right-click to cancel.
Combat.PlaceCloseBlast: Place Close Blast {size}: click adjacent to your token, right-click to cancel.
Combat.PlacePath: Place Path {size}: click squares to draw path, double-click to confirm, right-click to undo.
Combat.PlaceClosePath: Place Close Path {size}: start adjacent to your token, double-click to confirm, right-click to undo.

Rest.SpendRDLimited: You tried to spend {spent} RD but only have {current}. Spending {current} instead.

Haven.NoBuildSlots: You have no available building slots (Limit: {max}).
Haven.BuildingLimitReached: You have reached the maximum building limit (Limit: {max}).

Apply.CallingRemoved: Calling '{name}' and associated items removed from {actor}.
